title: Ceramic Essential Oil Diffuser For Home Electric 200ml Large Humidifier Cool Mist Aromatherapy Premium Ultrasonic 4 In 1, 9 LED Lights, 4 Timer Adjust Settings And Waterless Auto-Off Home Fragrance
features: Unique Ceramic Design: White ceramic cover, classic vertical stripes, make the essential oil diffuser look modern elegant but delicate. Classic wood-grain patterned base is a great way to show off your taste and style. with the aromas of your favourite essential oils, it softly streams essential oil-infused steam out into your space, lending your interior spaces a sense of luxurious comfort.

9 Color LED Lights: Press the light button of the electric diffuser to select the color. you can turn to automatic light change mode to relax. Turn off all lights for total darkness, a fine cool mist releases the aromatic properties throughout the air, while the LED-colored light helps you create your desired ambiance.Mist and light function can work separately.

4 in 1 Ultrasonic Diffuser: The essential oil diffusers for home has 4 Function, aromatherapy diffuser, cool mist humidifier, night light lamp, 4 timer safe settings(ON/2hrs/4 hrs/6 hrs) meets all your fragrance enjoyment needs. Aroma diffuser will automatically turn off when the water is used up. Bringing a comfortable experience to your home, office, bedroom, bathroom.

BPA-Free and Whisper: Ultrasonic technology diffuser humidifier operates silently, allowing you to enjoy the fragrance without any disruptive noise. Whether you use it during work, meditation or sleep, 200ml (work for 6.5-9.5 hrs) water capacity giving your home a fresh, fragrant scent, gently humidify the air and eliminate dust and allergens, relieve stress, and revel in deep relaxation.

Wonderful Gift Idea: The exquisite handmade fragrance scented oil diffuser can fit all kinds of decoration styles, the aromatherapy diffuser as a gift for your friends and family on mothers' day, valentine's day, anniversary, house-warming, wedding, birthday, party and christmas.Please feel free to contact us with any questions, we have a professional customer service team to deal with you!
